media_suggestion: Short video clip with an upbeat, lesser-known track playing. Host gives a thumbs up.
copy: Kicking off the month with a killer groove! What's the first track setting your vibe today?

media_suggestion: Static image with a cool music fact overlay. (e.g., 'Did you know the theremin was the first electronic instrument?')
copy: Drop some knowledge! What's a wild music fact that blew your mind? Share it with us!

media_suggestion: Boomerang of host tapping the mic or adjusting headphones in the studio.
copy: Getting ready to hit the airwaves and unleash some sonic goodness. What tracks are you hoping to hear?

media_suggestion: Poll sticker: 'Vinyl or Streaming?' with a cool graphic.
copy: The ultimate music debate! Where do you stand on the great listening format war?

media_suggestion: 15-second snippet of an unreleased or very new track we'll play soon. Album art on screen.
copy: Got something fresh brewing for your ears! This track is about to drop and it's a game-changer.

media_suggestion: Short clip from an iconic music video or album cover from a past decade.
copy: Taking it back to a classic that still hits hard! What's your go-to throwback anthem?

media_suggestion: Question sticker: 'Ask me anything about music!'
copy: Your chance to pick our brains about all things music! Send in your burning questions.

media_suggestion: Dynamic graphic featuring episode guests/topics, or a short video montage of highlights.
copy: New episode alert! This week, we're diving deep into the sounds of the Big Muddy, featuring exclusive interviews and fresh tracks. Don't miss the sonic journey!
call_to_action: Link in bio to listen now!

media_suggestion: A scenic outdoor shot with a chill, ambient track playing.
copy: Soaking up the good vibes and even better tunes today. What's your perfect Sunday soundtrack?

media_suggestion: Image of a legendary artist or historical music event.
copy: A nod to the legends who shaped the soundscape we love today. Who's your all-time music hero?

media_suggestion: Quick pan shot of the studio, focusing on interesting equipment or records.
copy: Getting the gear prepped for another epic show. The magic happens right here!

media_suggestion: Poll sticker: 'Workout Playlist or Chill Ambient?'
copy: What's dictating your music choice today? Are you powering up or winding down?

media_suggestion: Short video of host hinting at an exciting segment or guest for tomorrow's show.
copy: You won't want to miss tomorrow's deep dive into [genre/artist]! Get ready for some serious sonic exploration.

media_suggestion: Graphic asking for listener's favorite song played on Big Muddy Radio this week.
copy: We played some bangers this week! Which track stole your heart and earned a spot on repeat?

media_suggestion: Text overlay: 'Describe your favorite album in 3 emojis!'
copy: Let's get creative! Can you sum up your all-time favorite album using just three emojis?

media_suggestion: Eye-catching graphic with episode title and key discussion points, or a short audio clip.
copy: Tune in for this week's fresh episode, packed with genre-bending tracks and insights from emerging artists. Your weekend soundtrack starts here!

media_suggestion: Close-up of a spinning vinyl record with a soulful track playing.
copy: That crackle and warmth of vinyl just hits different. What's spinning on your turntable today?

media_suggestion: Image of an up-and-coming artist or a lesser-known gem. Short bio text.
copy: Shining a light on an artist whose sound is truly captivating. Get ready to discover your new obsession!

media_suggestion: Photo of a vintage microphone or a unique studio instrument.
copy: Geeking out over some classic studio gear today! What's an instrument you'd love to learn?

media_suggestion: Question sticker: 'What song always gets you dancing?'
copy: Need a pick-me-up? Share that one track that instantly gets your feet moving and spirits lifted!

media_suggestion: Screenshot of a curated Big Muddy Radio playlist on a streaming service.
copy: We've crafted the perfect playlist for your [mood/activity]! Dive into these hand-picked tunes.

media_suggestion: Album art of a deep cut or B-side that deserves more love.
copy: Every album has that hidden gem! What's an 'unsung hero' track you think everyone should hear?

media_suggestion: Graphic with a listener's name/handle and their requested song playing.
copy: Big shoutout to [Listener's Name] for the awesome request! We love hearing what tracks move you.

media_suggestion: Vertical video clip of the host excitedly introducing the new episode, with music playing.
copy: Ready for another sonic adventure? Our latest episode is live, featuring incredible stories and the freshest tracks. Get ready to turn up the volume!
call_to_action: Tap the link in bio to explore!

media_suggestion: An abstract, colorful animation with a dreamy, atmospheric track.
copy: Lost in the music and the moment today. What's the most immersive track you know?

media_suggestion: Graphic with 'Exploring [Genre]' and a montage of artists from that genre.
copy: Today, we're taking a deep dive into the roots and sounds of [Genre]. What makes this genre special to you?

media_suggestion: Short documentary-style clip about a song's creation or a band's process.
copy: Ever wonder about the stories behind your favorite songs? We're pulling back the curtain today!
call_to_action: What song's story do you love?

media_suggestion: Quiz sticker with a multiple-choice music trivia question.
copy: Test your music knowledge! Can you ace this Big Muddy Radio trivia challenge?

media_suggestion: Carousel of new album art covers from recent releases.
copy: Friday means fresh tunes! We've got a stack of new releases you need to hear this weekend.

media_suggestion: Short, shaky video clip of an artist soundchecking for a live session.
copy: Something special is brewing in the studio! Get ready for an exclusive live session coming your way soon.
call_to_action: Who do you want to see live?

media_suggestion: Upbeat, energetic track playing over a graphic encouraging weekend fun.
copy: The weekend is HERE! Crank up the volume and let the good times roll with this ultimate warm-up track.

media_suggestion: Short, punchy video with fast cuts of music clips and text overlays of episode highlights.
copy: Don't miss the latest sonic journey from Big Muddy Radio! Our new episode is packed with rhythm, soul, and everything in between. Tune in for your weekly dose of musical bliss!
call_to_action: Click the link in bio to listen!

media_suggestion: Time-lapse video of a sunrise or sunset with an inspiring, cinematic track.
copy: Embracing the beauty of the day with a soundtrack that moves the soul. What song inspires you?

media_suggestion: Carousel of top songs/artists played this month, or a 'What's coming next?' graphic.
copy: What a month of incredible music! We've loved sharing these sounds with you and can't wait for what's next. Stay tuned for more!
